task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the work items list or backlog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the work item tracking system (e.g., Azure DevOps, Jira, or a web-based tracker) displaying a list of work items.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies or filters for work items in the 'New' state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a filter applied for State = 'New', or the agent viewing a board/list specifically showing 'New' items.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the work item containing '500 Error' in the title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the details page or edit pane for the work item titled 'API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name'.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the Priority of the '500 Error' item to 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Priority field of the '500 Error' work item being changed to or saved as '1'.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the 'Stability' tag to the '500 Error' item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the tag 'Stability' added to the tags section of the '500 Error' work item.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the Area Path of the '500 Error' item to the Project Root ('TailwindTraders').
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Area Path field of the '500 Error' work item set to 'TailwindTraders'.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to interact with the work items.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser or dedicated application UI is visible, showing genuine navigation and interaction, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent modified the fields within the tracking system UI and saved the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Dropdowns, text inputs, and save buttons are interacted with in the UI, or success/saved indicators are visible.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the underlying data files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor or IDE (like VS Code, Vim, or Notepad) is shown manually modifying a 'work_items.json' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Although the task mentions eight new work items, only one item in the provided data actually matches the keyword rules: the item containing '500 Error' in its title ('API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name'). The VLM should verify that this specific item has its Priority set to 1, Tag set to 'Stability', and Area Path set to 'TailwindTraders'.
